subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! These are souls who have bowed their necks before Thy sovereignty, whose voices are hushed in awe of Thy grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء نفوس خضعت اعناقهم لسلطنتک و خشعت اصواتهم من عظمتک و انشرحت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
